titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University College of Arts and Sciences records14-2-767
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-04-14 18:05:22 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University College of Arts and Sciences records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. College of Arts and Sciences

did.abstract: Correspondence of Deans Robert M. Ogden, Cornelis Willem de Kiewiet, Leonard S. Cottrell, Paul M. O'Leary, and Francis E. Mineka with members of the faculty and administration; reports of department heads to the Deans; actions of the Board of Trustees; correspondence and reports dealing with faculty appointments, promotions, working conditions, departmental plans, curricula, research, budgets, the School of Education, the work of various committees of the College, the administration of the Dean's Office, and other matters.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence of Deans Robert M. Ogden, Cornelis Willem de Kiewiet, Leonard S. Cottrell, Paul M. O'Leary, and Francis E. Mineka with members of the faculty and administration; reports of department heads to the Deans; actions of the Board of Trustees; correspondence and reports dealing with faculty appointments, promotions, working conditions, departmental plans, curricula, research, budgets, the School of Education, the work of various committees of the College, the administration of the Dean's Office, and other matters.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University College of Arts and Sciences records, #14-2-767. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Boxes 22-24, and 26 restricted in part to the permission of the office of origin.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Registrar's cards in boxes 15-18 are to be requested by student name.
